description.value: Your polyps constantly and passively adapt over time based on your life experiences and goals. You can spend a month of downtime to retrain your copaxi heritage. Additionally, you can perform other downtime activities while retraining, but only while retraining your copaxi heritage, copaxi ancestry feats, initial trained skills, skill increases, or skill feats—not when retraining class features, class feats, and so on.
